title: Buscando a Mónica
writer: Jaime de Armiñán, Vicente Coello, José María Forqué
actors: Carmen Sevilla, Alberto de Mendoza, Jardel Filho
plot: A man has a street accident with his car in his way to Buenos Aires. While he waits for his car repairing, this business man learns that everybody in the little town where he's stuck seem to know about his wife Mónica. He knows li...
